summary: Adventure chunk from Into the Outdoors with Gun and Camera page 120, chunk 5.

source_text.source_title: Into the Outdoors with Gun and Camera

mechanics.raw_text:
The smell of gasoline, methane ‘and alcohol fills the air, guys of various ‘clearances from R&D and Tech: Vehicle Serv- ices Division wander about, busily checking, things off on clipboards or rolling wildly 
‘around on the ground attempting to put out the flames. From the walls, guards and com- bots watch the proceedings with interest.
